title: nepeta supina
intro: Nepeta supina, also known as Persian catmint or wood mint, is a perennial herb native to Asia and parts of Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. Nepeta supina has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and boosted immune function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
